results.justification: EXACT TWIN — VQ-VAE discrete codebook without collapse IS the K-symbol discrete gesture vocabulary catalog mechanism.
Finite scalar quantization simpler VQ-VAE discrete codebook covers discrete symbol vocabulary mechanism.
Hierarchical discrete codebook + multi-level representation covers compound-code multi-aspect representation mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — MoE top-k gating + hierarchical routing IS the discrete-symbol context gating + MoE expert-routing mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Head-specific gate after SDPA IS the per-context gesture-vocabulary gating mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Discrete latent codes as bridges in hierarchical control + LLM output → discrete control vocabulary IS the discrete-gesture-symbol routing mechanism.
MoE router selects top-k experts + sparse activation covers bimanual top-2 selection + expert-routing mechanism.
